description:
Add a styled footer CTA section to every page (update the shared Footer component or add a new section above it).

Content:
"If you're in NYC and would like to introduce yourself, join our Discord and post in #intros."
(Discord link: placeholder # for now — will be updated with real invite)

"If you'd like to learn more about Fractal and prefer a one-on-one conversation, schedule a virtual chat with Ian."
Ian scheduling link: https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ0JUlLukwG9ny_ji86woEKDTE2qWsePnoAz9Ao3Rl4SBssPVd_56rmYcnbb4oO6dIlPiqybWrSo

Style should match the site aesthetic — warm, not heavy. A clear wayfinding nudge at the bottom of every page. Mobile-first.
title: Global footer CTA: Discord #intros + schedule chat with Ian on every page
